# MeshCoverage - A tool for analyzing and visualizing the coverage of a meshtastic network.
MeshCoverage is a powerful tool designed to help users analyze and visualize the coverage of their meshtastic network. It provides insights into the signal strength and connectivity of devices within the network, allowing users to optimize their setup for better performance.

## Directives
- Always use English(UK).
- Don't delete comments describing the working principle, instructions or helpful informations
- Never use leaflet-heat as it gives really bad results.
- Prefer code generalization, re use existing functions where possible or generalize them.
- Scan MeshCoverage_prompt.txt for more instructions and information about the project.
